positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial guardian. The central subject is a majestic, stylized cosmic owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has sharp, geometric wings and glowing, iridescent eyes. It is surrounded by swirling galaxies, scattered constellations, and abstract geometric patterns resembling sacred geometry. The style is a fusion of Art Nouveau line work and cosmic psychedelia, rendered with clean, thick linework and vibrant contrasting colors: deep indigo, electric teal, gold leaf accents, and soft lavender. Use strong contrast and negative space to make the silhouette pop. Composition must be centered, ideal for a print repeat or single focal point on apparel. Vector art feel, high detail, highly legible.
